zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Netherton於大約1680年出生在美國馬里蘭州塞西爾時，他的父親Henry Netherton29歲，母親Sarah Welwing30歲。他於1707年1月7日與Sarah Tucker在美國維吉尼亞州威斯特摩蘭威斯特摩蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1716年11月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州威斯特摩蘭可普爾 馬吉斯特利亞爾 迪斯特利可特享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Netherton于大约1680年出生在美国马里兰州塞西爾时，他的父亲Henry Netherton29岁，母亲Sarah Welwing30岁。他于1707年1月7日与Sarah Tucker在美国弗吉尼亚州威斯特摩蘭威斯特摩蘭结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1716年11月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州威斯特摩蘭可普爾 馬吉斯特利亞爾 迪斯特利可特享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Netherton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from one or more of the many minor places called Netherton in Devon (the placename occurs in the parishes of Berry Pomeroy, Buckland Monachorum, Combe Martin, Farway, Haccombe, Hartland, Sherford, and Staverton), or from one or more of the other places in England called Netherton, found in Worcestershire, Northumberland, Lancashire, and Yorkshire. All of these placenames derive from Middle English nether ‘lower’ + toun ‘settlement’ (Old English neothera, tūn).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Netherton was born about 1680, in Cecil, Maryland, United States, his father, Henry Netherton, was 29 and his mother, Sarah Welwing, was 30. He married Sarah Tucker on 7 January 1707, in Westmoreland, Westmoreland, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 28 November 1716, in Cople Magisterial District, Westmoreland, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 37.

Il a épousé Sarah Tucker le 7 janvier 1707, à Westmoreland, Westmoreland, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Netherton um 1680 in Cecil, Maryland, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Netherton 29 und seine Mutter Sarah Welwing 30. Er hat am 7. Januar 1707 in Westmoreland, Westmoreland, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Sarah Tucker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. November 1716 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Cople Magisterial District, Westmoreland, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Netherton(이)가 대략 1680년 미국 메릴랜드 주 세실에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Netherton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Welwing(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1707년 1월 7일 미국 버지니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 웨스트모렐랜드에서 Sarah Tucker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1716년 11월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 코플 매지스테리앨 디스트릭트에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Netherton nasceu aproximadamente 1680, em Cecil, Marilândia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Henry Netherton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Welwing, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Tucker em 7 de janeiro de 1707, em Westmoreland, Westmoreland, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de novembro de 1716, em Cople Magisterial District, Westmoreland, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Netherton родился около 1680 г. в местности кесил, Мэриленд, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Henry Netherton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Welwing, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Tucker 7 января 1707 г. в местности вестмореланд, вестмореланд, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 28 ноября 1716 г. в местности копл магистиряль дистрикт, вестмореланд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Netherton nació aproximadamente 1680, en Cecil, Maryland, Estados Unidos, su papá, Henry Netherton, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Sarah Welwing, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sarah Tucker el 7 de enero de 1707, en Westmoreland, Westmoreland, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de noviembre de 1716, en Cople Magisterial District, Westmoreland, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 37 años.
